title: Select a sidereal ayanamsha

positions.summary: Anchor Spica/Chitra to exactly 180 degrees sidereal using declared J2000 coordinates.
Lahiri, Raman, KP, Yukteshvara and other named policies require distinct constants or algorithms.

default_policy.rationale: It is dynamically reproducible from a declared stellar anchor and is not mislabeled as another named ayanamsha.

user_disclosure: This result uses the project's fixed-Spica true-Citra origin; other ayanamshas can change signs and subdivisions near boundaries.
